catalog.name_already_exists: Name already exists, please choose another
catalog.invalid_agent_id: Invalid agent id (needs to be filename-safe)

composer.tool_nodejs_rules_body:
The core of `definitionId: tool_nodejs` is the **`script` field**—must write a complete executable shell/node command.
- `script`: Pipeline spawns directly, stdout becomes result, exit code determines success/failure
- `body`: When `script` exists, it serves only as human-readable comment, **will NOT be executed**
- `script` supports `${}` placeholders referencing input slots and system variables (workspaceRoot, runDir, etc.), values are auto shell-quoted
- **Do NOT** wrap `${workspaceRoot}` etc. with extra double quotes (e.g., `node "${workspaceRoot}/..."`); write `node ${workspaceRoot}/...` instead, otherwise path will contain extra quotes causing execution failure
- **Forbidden** to only write natural language description in `body` without `script`—this leads to no executable code at runtime
- If logic is too complex to write complete `script`, use `agent_subAgent` instead (also change definitionId)
composer.task_instruction: Please complete only the above single task, no extra modifications. After completion, sync UI per context instructions.
composer.fix_task_title: ## Task: Fix flow.yaml to pass validate-flow
composer.fix_errors_intro: The following errors must be **all eliminated** (same rules as CLI `agentflow validate` / `validate-flow.mjs`):
composer.fix_constraints_body:
- **Only** edit the "flow definition file" `flow.yaml` in context, do not modify unrelated files.
- Prefer minimal changes: add edges, fix sourceHandle/targetHandle, role, model, instance structure, etc.
composer.skip_validation_for_phase: Skipping validation for current phase (will validate at final phase)

runner.cursor_account_limit: [agentflow] Cursor account limit: detected Auto-only support, auto-retrying once (Auto)...

tool.nodejs_script_hint: script success/failure determined by exit code (0=success), stdout directly becomes result slot content (plain text, e.g., console.log).

planner.planner_format_error: Planner returned unexpected format, falling back to single-step
planner.planner_call_failed: Planner call failed ({{message}}), falling back to heuristic analysis
planner.phased_format_error: Phased planner returned unexpected format, using default agent step
planner.phased_planning_failed: Phased planning failed ({{message}}), using default agent step

control_start.description: Entry point of AgentFlow, all flows should start from this node

control_end.description: End point of AgentFlow, flow terminates after this node

tool_user_ask.description: Pause and wait for the user to pick one of N branches. Each output slot is an option; the slot description is the option label (human-driven switch).

tool_user_check.description: Wait for user confirmation, flow pauses. Requires user to reply 'continue' to resume

control_if.description: Has exactly one bool type input. Continues to next1 if true, next2 if false

control_anyOne.description: Continues to next when any upstream input is ready

control_toBool.description: Convert execution task result to boolean and write to prediction slot

tool_nodejs.description: Execute Node.js script, success determined by exit code, stdout as result

tool_print.description: Output content to user with special font style

tool_save_key.description: Save key-value pair to global storage

provide_str.description: Provide a text value directly, value will be passed to downstream as-is

provide_file.description: Provide file path or content directly, value will be passed to downstream as-is

module-migrate.description: Module migration pipeline (Define scope -> Confirm -> Migrate -> Static loop -> Compile loop -> Output document)

get_figma_tree.label: Get Figma Node Tree and Screenshots

ai_semantic.label: AI Semantic Analysis of Screenshot Structure
